faqs.question: What pests are most common in Harrison, NY?
faqs.answer: Harrison residents frequently encounter ants, carpenter ants, termites, spiders, mice, rats, cockroaches, and stinging insects. The area's wooded surroundings and older housing stock can attract these pests seasonally, making professional general pest control essential for year-round protection.

faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and family-safe application methods for all Harrison properties. Our technicians are trained in the latest integrated pest management techniques that minimize chemical exposure while maximizing effectiveness, ensuring your loved ones stay safe.
